3009225.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3009225.description: While getting ready for a big dance competition, Felicity starts having nightmares about the Boogie Man. // In order to help Miguel win the "Golden Ladle" prize in Mythlandia's annual cook-off competition, Felicity buys him a bag of magic beans.

3009296.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3009296.description: It's Eggtober and Rudy is scared everyone will discover he's lying about being related to the Easter Bunny. // Felicity and Miguel are stuck together by magical friendship bracelets that will only unlock if they prove they're really best friends.

3009365.title: Dorg van Dango
3009365.description: It's Taco Tuesday and there's a taco shell shortage in town. Patronella casts a spell that ends up going wrong. / A high-tech rival store opens up across from the 98 Cent Store, Dorg and the gang use their powers to keep his mom in business!

3009584.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3009584.description: Private's quirky Uncle Nigel pops in for a  visit from across the pond. // The boys intercept a fax with cartographic news; Maurice has only 24 hours to live. In order to make Maurice's assumed final day comfortable, the entire zoo bands together.

3009645.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3009645.description: Private discovers a stack of lost comic books. Skipper immediately commands their destruction, citing their risky influence. // Shakespeare in the park has inspired Private as he struts around the zoo spouting iambic pentameter laden insults.

3009708.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3009708.description: The Turtles must defend their home in the sewers when Bradford tries to destroy it with a dangerous chemical.

3009751.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3009751.description: When simultaneous threats from the Purple Dragons and Baxter Stockman's mechanical Mousers force the Turtles to split into two groups, Donnie & Mikey must prove that their "B Team" is just as valuable as Leo & Raph's "A Team."

3009933.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3009933.description: Crocker seeks out a new source of magic from Timmy's house. Realizing it's Sparky, Crocker tries to turn him against Timmy. // Timmy wishes everyone was dumber than him. A meteor threatens Earth and Timmy's the only one smart enough to stop it.

3009997.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3009997.description: Dad refuses to sell Sparky to his boss so he makes Dad's life miserable at work. Timmy and Sparky hatch a plan.

3010038.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3010038.description: When Dave refuses to let Alvin get a dangerous toy sports car, Alvin secretly convinces Simon to build him an exact replica of the car. Will Alvin be able to keep this secret from Dave? Or will it turn out that the toy car is TOO FAST - TOO FURIOUS?!

3010052.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3010052.description: Alvin must pass a manners course before he gets his dream meeting with the beautiful Princess of England! Problem is, he has to convince Brittany he's worthy.

3010084.title: SpongeBob
3010084.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3010138.title: SpongeBob
3010138.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3010416.title: SpongeBob
3010416.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3010457.title: SpongeBob
3010457.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3010531.title: SpongeBob
3010531.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3010599.title: SpongeBob
3010599.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3010705.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3010705.description: When Dave discovers he didn't graduate from high school, he finds himself in school with Alvin. Talk about the Odd Couple.

3010723.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3010723.description: Simon has found a new best friend, Jamie. He's smart, funny, and shares Simon's love of Science. But when Jamie realizes that Alvin is the more popular brother, he ditches Simon to get in with the cool crowd. Can the brothers survive this new friend?

3010749.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3010749.description: After squabbling with his brothers, Alvin convinces Dave to give him his own room, but soon realizes living alone isn't what it's cracked up to be.

3010815.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3010815.description: When Burt the elephant asks the penguins to help him sneak out of the zoo, they take on the challenge and get the big guy out. / Marlene catches a glimpse of Fred the squirrel and falls in love at first sight.

3011165.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3011165.description: When Alice mentions that one of the penguins is actually female, Skipper has an identity crisis. / After a big fight Mason moves out-and in with the penguins. Unfortunately, Mason is a very annoying house guest.

3011218.title: The Loud House
3011218.description: Hit by the realization that her big sister will be going off to college soon, Leni tries to thwart Lori's plans. // Lincoln and Clyde start their own cookie-making business, but realize it's a lot more work than they realized.

3011301.title: The Loud House
3011301.description: Lynn's extreme sports superstitions cause chaos at a professional hockey match. // Unable to part with their childhood toys, the kids try to convince Mom and Dad that they still play with them.

3011389.title: De Casagrandes
3011389.description: The family discovers an amazing tamale cart and tries to keep it a secret from Abuela. // Ronnie Anne doesn't believe in an astrological prediction that "love will find her," until it seems to come true.

3011700.title: De Casagrandes
3011700.description: Ronnie Anne is determined to help CJ get onstage at a Pirate Dinner Show. // Ronnie and Sid have to decide whether they "borrow" money from a lost coin purse they found in the mercado.

3011788.title: SpongeBob
3011788.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3011870.title: SpongeBob
3011870.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3012162.title: SpongeBob
3012162.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3012224.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3012224.description: Captain Man & Kid Danger are tasked with driving to pick up 1,000 hot dogs for a birthday party.

3012286.title: Breadwinners
3012286.description: When Pumpers holds a talent show, SwaySway must overcome his stage fright to perform a love song for Jenny Quackles. // SwaySway and Buhdeuce convince the Bread Maker to lose a wrestling match to Lava Mole.

3012343.title: Dorg van Dango
3012343.description: The gang fix Patronella's old wand, turning her into Patti Perfect. She starts zapping every imperfection in town. // The pineapple man monster from Dorg's nightmares follows him into the real world!

3012412.title: Sanjay & Craig
3012412.description: When Sanjay forgets to take out the garbage, a trip to the dump turns into a journey of galactic proportions. // The kids are desperate to get the most popular toy in town, but their attempts are thwarted by an obnoxious kid.

3012500.title: Sanjay & Craig
3012500.description: Sanjay and Craig manage to get Megan kicked out of her prestigious club for winners-only. // After Sanjay and Craig hear a sad song that makes them feel better, they do everything they can to try and replicate the sensation.

3012565.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3012565.description: When the penguins bring Marlene with them on a sno-cone mission in the park, she can't handle the freedom of being outside the zoo walls. / Max the cat is on the run from evil animal control Officer X, and he comes to the penguins for help.

3012625.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3012625.description: When Julien is taken to the infirmary for acting even weirder than usual, Maurice is left in charge.

3061445.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3061445.description: When Casey, Raph, Mikey and Donnie are captured by a new mutant, both April and Leo must overcome disabilities in order to save them.

3061499.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3061499.description: Leo takes the Turtles to train in the woods in an advanced ninja ritual where they must overcome their weaknesses and face their greatest enemies in order to become true ninjas.

3061585.title: Ollie's Pack
3061585.description: When Cleo runs for class president, Ollie summons Courtney Poweredge from the pack to be her campaign manager. // Nobody but Ollie suspects that the new school janitor is a monster.

3062391.title: SpongeBob
3062391.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3062464.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3062464.description: After Po unleashes an "impossible move," he's told that the most powerful fighter in the Valley of Peace always turns evil, and that's him!

3062528.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3062528.description: After Po disobeys Shifu's orders, the Hierarchy of the Sacred Onyx Council replaces Shifu with a new master who banishes the Furious Five and plans to destroy Shifu.

3063338.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3063338.description: When Alvin inadvertently destroys Theodore's bicycle, he enters the boys in a roundup of shopping carts where the first prize is a new bike.

3063360.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3063360.description: The Chipmunks and Chipettes try to reduce their carbon footprint when Jeanette signs them up for a Green Living competition.

3063402.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3063402.description: Alvin is so taken with a girl at school, that he agrees to look after her talking Mina bird. But when Alvin says something damaging, he worries the bird will repeat it to the girl and must find a way to keep the bird from blabbing.

3063429.title: SpongeBob
3063429.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3063499.title: SpongeBob
3063499.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3064269.title: De Casagrandes
3064269.description: When Ronnie Anne realizes that she's not up to date on all of the latest trends, she seeks help from Carlota. // Bobby struggles to find Sergio after wishing he would fly away and never come back.

3064331.title: The Loud House
3064331.description: Lincoln plots to take the "perfect" family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. // Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

3064444.title: Huize Herrie
3064444.description: After witnessing an excess of lying in the family, Lisa invents lie-detecting glasses to try and curb the fibs.

3065168.title: Hier is Pony
3065168.description: Annie and Pony want to deliver produce to their customers, but their new business is threatened by a big corporation. // Annie needs to find the perfect Mother's Day gift. Pony's convinced that Annie's magic trick is just the thing.

3065251.title: SpongeBob
3065251.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3065327.title: SpongeBob
3065327.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3065384.title: SpongeBob
3065384.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3066237.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3066237.description: After April receives a warning from her imprisoned father, she and the Turtles embark on a mission to save him and stop the Kraang from detonating a mutagen bomb in the city.

3066304.title: The Loud House
3066304.description: Lincoln wishes he had ten brothers instead of ten sisters, and Lisa gives him a glimpse into that reality. // Lola wants to be a part of the siblings' secrets club, but they won't let her in because she's a 'tattle tale'.

3066391.title: The Loud House
3066391.description: Lincoln becomes Luan's clown assistant but starts hogging the spotlight. // The Loud kids set out to show Lisa what is 'fun' about a snow day.

3067206.title: De Casagrandes
3067206.description: Adelaide and Carl have an adventure on Mr. Chang's route, but can they work together to save the day? // When Mama Lupe comes to visit, Abuela tries to get her family at the top of their cultural game.

3067273.title: SpongeBob
3067273.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3067346.title: SpongeBob
3067346.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3068187.title: Avatar
3068187.description: After Aang accidentally sets off a Fire Nation trap, he is banished from the South Pole. Soon after Prince Zuko attacks the Southern Water Tribe seeking to capture the Avatar. Aang returns and surrenders to save the Water Tribe.

3068280.title: Avatar
3068280.description: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

3069116.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3069116.description: Timmy wishes Mr. Dinkleberg would replace Dad as Squirrely Scout leader. Dad tries to regain Timmy's respect and his position. // Cosmo has amnesia and thinks he's Dad's genie. Timmy and Wanda must jog Cosmo's memory before Dad destroys the earth.

3069176.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3069176.description: Using Timmy's DNA, Crocker pretends to be Timmy from the future.

3069206.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3069206.description: Po befriends a band of dancers, unaware they're actually a band of traveling thieves.

3069282.title: Ollie's Pack
3069282.description: Ollie summons Lucius Van Horn to act as the Sasquatch, to amp up Portshill's history. // When Ollie and Bernie get wrapped up in a video game, Cleo befriends a monster, named Trina.

3069329.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3069329.description: It's Jeanette's birthday but she doesn't want to celebrate it, since she no longer believes in the magic of this special day. So the Chipmunks and Chipettes join forces in order to offer her a magical, fairy-tale birthday she will ever forget.

3069935.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3069935.description: Following a fight with Brittany, Eleanor decides to move in with Alvin and his brothers! Alvin panics! Their 'bro zone' has been invaded!

3069960.title: Huize Herrie
3069960.description: Tired of doing favors to get a ride from Lori, Lincoln decides it's time to help Leni pass her driver's test. // Lincoln conspires with the rest of his sisters to overthrow Lori's tyranny as their "baby"sitter.

3070021.title: De Casagrandes
3070021.description: Carl's love for toys gets him caught up in a whirlwind toy review career. // Frida's art gets a bad review, the kids try to stage a new auction to lift her spirits.

3070112.title: SpongeBob
3070112.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3070892.title: SpongeBob
3070892.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.
